define.name: CAN_FRAMING_ERROR
define.brief: Framing error on the CAN bus.

define.name: CAN_EVENT_RX
define.brief: One or more frames became available.

define.name: CAN_EVENT_TX
define.brief: One or more transmit mailboxes became available.

config.name: CAN_USE_SYNCHRONIZATION
config.brief: Support for synchronous CAN transmit and receive APIs.

config.name: CAN_USE_SLEEP_MODE
config.brief: Support for CAN sleep mode APIs.

config.name: CAN_USE_CONFIGURATIONS
config.note: When enabled the user must provide a variable named @p can_configurations of type @p can_configurations_t.

macro.name: CAN_MAILBOX_TO_MASK
macro.brief: Converts a mailbox index to a bit mask.

macro.name: canTransmit
macro.param: Pointer to the CAN driver instance.

macro.name: canReceive
macro.param: Pointer to the CAN driver instance.

macro.name: _can_tx_empty_isr
macro.brief: Common ISR code, TX mailbox empty event.
macro.param: Pointer to the CAN driver instance.

macro.name: _can_rx_full_isr
macro.brief: Common ISR code, RX mailbox full event.
macro.param: Pointer to the CAN driver instance.

macro.name: _can_tx_empty_isr
macro.brief: Common ISR code, TX mailbox empty event.
macro.param: Pointer to the CAN driver instance.

macro.name: _can_rx_full_isr
macro.brief: Common ISR code, RX mailbox full event.
macro.param: Pointer to the CAN driver instance.

macro.name: _can_wakeup_isr
macro.brief: Common ISR code, CAN wakeup event.
macro.param: Pointer to the CAN driver instance.

macro.name: _can_error_isr
macro.brief: Common ISR code, CAN error event.
macro.param: Pointer to the CAN driver instance.

typedef.name: canmbx_t
typedef.brief: Type of a CAN mailbox index.

typedef.name: hal_can_driver_c
typedef.brief: Type of structure representing a CAN driver.

typedef.name: hal_can_config_t
typedef.brief: Type of structure representing a CAN configuration.

typedef.name: CANDriver
typedef.brief: Type of structure representing a CAN driver (legacy).

typedef.name: CANConfig
typedef.brief: Type of structure representing a CAN configuration (legacy).

fields.verbatim: /* End of the mandatory fields.*/ can_lld_config_fields;

field.name: cfgsnum
field.brief: Number of configurations in the open array.

fields.verbatim: /* End of the mandatory fields.*/ can_lld_driver_fields;

method.name: canTryTransmitI
method.brief: Attempts to queue a CAN frame for transmission.
method.retval: If the frame has been queued.

method.name: canTryReceiveI
method.brief: Attempts to fetch a CAN frame.
method.retval: If a frame has been fetched.

method.name: canTryAbortX
method.brief: Attempts to abort an ongoing transmission.

method.name: canTransmitTimeout
method.brief: Queues a CAN frame for transmission.

method.name: canReceiveTimeout
canSleep
canWakeup
method.brief: Forces CAN wakeup from sleep mode.

method.name: canGetEventsX
method.brief: Returns the cached CAN event flags.

method.name: canGetAndClearEventsX
method.brief: Gets and clears cached CAN event flags.
method.param: Event flags to get and clear.

method.name: canGetAndClearRxMailboxMaskX
method.brief: Gets and clears cached RX mailbox flags.

method.name: canGetAndClearTxMailboxMaskX
method.brief: Gets and clears cached TX mailbox flags.

method.name: canGetAndClearTxErrorMaskX
method.brief: Gets and clears cached TX error mailbox flags.
method.return: The pending TX error mailbox flags.

method.name: canGetAndClearErrorsX
method.brief: Gets and clears cached CAN error flags.
